zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线承压震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格围绕1618附近窄幅震荡，整体走势偏弱，反弹动能不足，多次上攻受阻，短线维持整理偏空结构延续弱势格局未见明显反转信号

MACD指标持续为负且动能柱走弱，显示空头占优；价格运行在SMA20下方，均线压制明显，短期反弹空间受限延续弱势信号

下方支撑关注1615一线及心理位1610附近，上方阻力在1622及1629均线位置，突破前仍以区间对待震荡为主谨慎操作

操作上建议以高抛低吸为主，避免追涨杀跌；若跌破1615需防进一步回撤，若放量突破1629可短线转多灵活应对

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a narrow consolidation phase around 1618, following a mild 24-hour decline of 0.17%. Price action remains compressed between 1615 and 1622, indicating reduced volatility and indecision. The broader short-term structure shows a slight bearish tilt as the market fails to sustain moves above the 20-period SMA. Overall momentum appears neutral-to-weak, with buyers lacking conviction to initiate a sustained breakout above recent highs.

Technical indicators suggest a softening momentum profile. The MACD reading at -14.11 confirms bearish pressure, with the histogram likely remaining below zero, signaling continued downside bias. Absence of RSI limits overbought/oversold confirmation, but price trading below the 20-SMA at 1629.27 reinforces a short-term bearish trend. The lack of a signal line value reduces clarity, yet overall structure leans toward cautious sentiment.

Immediate support is seen near 1615, aligning with the session low, followed by a psychological level at 1600 which may act as stronger demand. On the upside, resistance sits at 1622, the recent high, with stronger supply near the 20-SMA at 1629.27. A break above this level could open a path toward 1650, while failure to hold 1615 risks deeper retracement toward 1600 support zone.

Strategy-wise, the market favors range-bound approaches until a decisive breakout occurs. Traders may consider buying near the 1615–1600 support zone with tight risk controls, targeting a rebound toward 1622 and 1629. Conversely, bearish setups become more attractive if price rejects resistance and breaks below 1615. In that case, momentum could accelerate toward 1600. Risk management remains essential given the compressed volatility environment.
